items.headline: 4-unit condo building permitted in Venture City
items.summary: A 4-unit multi-family project at 31 Isabela Trail receives permit in the Venture City area. This is the only multi-family housing project in this batch, adding density to a neighborhood that otherwise saw only single-family homes permitted.

items.headline: City Council revokes tobacco retailer permits for two shops
items.summary: The Council held public hearings and voted to revoke business licenses and tobacco retailer permits for California Cigar and Hayes Smoke Shop. The agenda does not specify the grounds for revocation.

items.headline: Interim ordinance on tobacco sales supersedes prior version
items.summary: The Council held a public hearing to consider adopting a new interim ordinance that would replace a prior interim ordinance implementing state tobacco regulations. The agenda does not detail what changes the new ordinance contains.

items.headline: Council to study updates to Health and Safety Element of General Plan
items.summary: The City Council scheduled a study session to review and update the Health and Safety Element of Cupertino's General Plan (2015-2040 Community Vision). This element guides the city's approach to public health, emergency preparedness, and safety infrastructure over the next decade.

items.headline: Silicon Valley Orthodontics permitted to open on El Camino Real
items.summary: A new orthodontics practice has received permits to establish signage at 1865 El Camino Real in the Neighborhood Commercial zone.

items.headline: Four homes permitted at Comm Hill Phase 3.1
items.summary: Four single-family homes receive permits at the Comm Hill development on Altino Boulevard (Lots 24, 25, 26, 27). This concentrated cluster of permits suggests the phase is moving forward on multiple lots simultaneously.
